edge_cases: EC-01: API Timeout or connection failure with 185 system during label fetching.
EC-02: Conflicting rules (e.g., Order qualifies for both Air Freight and contains restricted items requiring Sea Freight).
EC-03: Concurrent judgment triggers if an order is updated while judgment is processing.

stories.title: 鑑定狀態檢查 (Authentication Check)
ac: Given an order with 'Authentication Service' purchased, When checking status, Then verify 185 API response.
If status is 'C-3 (Pending Authentication)', block order and route to Authentication Dept.
If status is 'C-1-a (Fake)', retain on shelf and trigger manual refund workflow.

stories.title: 合規與特殊商品檢查 (Compliance & Restricted Check)
ac: Given order labels from 185, When evaluating items, Then flag restricted goods (C-1-c).
If 'B-3 (Lithium Battery)' label exists, require worker to attach battery sticker and force Sagawa export.
If 'B-4 (Alcohol)' label exists, require worker inspection and force Sagawa export with alcohol declaration.

stories.title: 出貨與集貨規則 (Shipping & Consolidation Rules)
ac: Given WMS inbound records, When evaluating the same member's orders on the same day, Then check count >= 3.
If regular member (B-6), route to Consolidation Box, pending worker release.
If non-regular member (B-5), allow sequential release based on 2-item-per-day limit.

stories.title: 國際運送方式自動決策 (International Freight Routing)
ac: Given order contents, When comparing against import/export customs rules, Then determine freight type.
Output must be one of: 'Pass (Air)', 'Force Air Transfer', 'Force Sea Transfer'.
